description: Ground truth test cases for RAG evaluation. Each query maps to expected source documents and topics. The 'relevantChunkIds' field will be populated after seeding when chunk IDs are known.

testCases.expectedAnswer: FlowBoard offers three tiers: Free (up to 5 users, 3 projects), Pro ($12/user/month), and Enterprise ($29/user/month). Annual billing saves 20%.
Yes, FlowBoard has Kanban boards with drag-and-drop task cards, customizable columns, swimlanes, and WIP limits.

testCases.query: How do I create my first project?
testCases.expectedAnswer: Click 'Create Project', provide a name and project key (2-4 letters), choose a template or start blank, and set privacy (public or private).
Yes, FlowBoard is SOC 2 Type II certified, audited annually by an independent third-party auditor. Enterprise customers can request the SOC 2 report by emailing compliance@flowboard.io.

testCases.query: Is there a FlowBoard mobile app?
testCases.expectedAnswer: Yes, FlowBoard has native iOS and Android apps with offline mode, push notifications, and feature parity with the web version. Download from App Store or Google Play.

testCases.query: What is the FlowBoard API rate limit?
testCases.expectedAnswer: Free tier: 100 requests/hour, Pro: 1,000 requests/hour, Enterprise: 5,000 requests/hour. Rate limits reset on the hour.

testCases.query: Can I import my Jira projects into FlowBoard?
testCases.expectedAnswer: Yes, use the Jira Import wizard (Settings > Integrations > Jira Import). It transfers projects, issues, comments, attachments, and custom fields. The import is idempotent and supports incremental updates.

testCases.query: What happens when I downgrade from Pro to Free?
testCases.expectedAnswer: Downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing period. If you exceed Free limits (>5 users, >3 projects), you must remove excess users or archive projects before the downgrade completes. You'll receive email instructions 7 days before.

testCases.query: How do I give a client view-only access?
testCases.expectedAnswer: Invite them as a Guest (Settings > Team > Invite Members > select Guest role). Guests have read-only access to specific projects you assign, can comment, but cannot create or edit tasks. Guests don't count as billable users.
FlowBoard integrates with Slack, GitHub, GitLab, Google Drive, Figma, Jira (import), and Zapier (5,000+ apps). Free tier includes Slack and Google Drive. Pro and Enterprise get all integrations.

testCases.query: How do I set up two-factor authentication?
testCases.expectedAnswer: Go to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication, click 'Enable 2FA', scan the QR code with an authenticator app (Authy, Google Authenticator, 1Password), enter the 6-digit code, and save your recovery codes.

testCases.query: Can I use FlowBoard offline on my phone?
testCases.expectedAnswer: Yes, the mobile app supports offline mode. You can view cached tasks, create/edit tasks, and add comments offline. Changes sync automatically when you reconnect. Conflict resolution handles simultaneous edits.
The Free plan costs $0/month and includes up to 5 users, 3 projects, 5 GB storage, and basic features. It's perfect for small teams or freelancers.

testCases.query: I need something for my team of 20 with SSO, what do you recommend?
testCases.expectedAnswer: You need the Enterprise tier ($29/user/month or $24/user/month annually). It includes SSO (SAML), advanced security, audit logs, dedicated support, and 99.95% uptime SLA. Minimum 50 users required. Contact sales@flowboard.io for custom pricing.

testCases.query: how much storage do I get and can I connect to github
testCases.expectedAnswer: Free tier: 5 GB storage. Pro tier: 100 GB per user. Enterprise: unlimited storage. GitHub integration is available for Pro and Enterprise users - it syncs pull requests, commits, and branch status automatically.

testCases.query: We're worried about GDPR - is our data safe in FlowBoard?
testCases.expectedAnswer: Yes, FlowBoard is fully GDPR compliant. We provide Data Processing Agreements (DPA), EU data residency options (AWS Frankfurt), support for data subject rights (access, deletion, portability), and AES-256 encryption at rest.

FlowBoard pricing: Free (5 users, 3 projects), Pro ($12/user/month), Enterprise ($29/user/month). We don't have direct Asana comparison data in the knowledge base, but FlowBoard's pricing is competitive for similar feature sets.

testCases.query: tell me everything about the enterprise plan
testCases.expectedAnswer: Enterprise plan ($29/user/month or $24 annually) includes: SSO/SAML, 2FA enforcement, audit logs, data residency options, 99.95% uptime SLA, dedicated Customer Success Manager, unlimited storage, custom contracts, priority support (2-hour SLA), advanced permissions, SCIM provisioning. Minimum 50 users. Contact sales@flowboard.io.
